# Linear Algebra Matrix Calculator

> Free interactive linear algebra matrix calculator with step-by-step educational explanations for matrix and vector operations.

Canonical URL: https://treinart.github.io/Linear-Algebra-Matrix-Calculator/

## Pages

- [Interactive Matrix Calculator](https://treinart.github.io/Linear-Algebra-Matrix-Calculator/): Browser-based calculator for matrix addition, multiplication, inverses, RREF, determinants, eigenvalues, Hessian matrices, vector operations, decompositions, and related linear algebra topics.

## Use

This site is intended for students and self-learners who want worked linear algebra calculations and explanations. The calculator runs entirely in the browser.

## Attribution

Creator: Travis Reinart
